headline: Does Rising U.S. Portfolio Trading Share Amid Softer Volumes Change The Bull Case For MarketAxess (MKTX)?
summary: In Q2 2026, MarketAxess Holdings reported an 11% year-over-year drop in average daily trading volume to US$43.6 billion, even as total credit trading volume edged up 1% to over US$1.04 trillion, with Emerging Markets and certain government bond segments helping offset weaker U.S. government, high-grade, and high-yield activity. At the same time, the company’s estimated U.S. credit portfolio trading market share increased to 20.6% from 17.5%, highlighting growing penetration in this segment...
